title: PacPack Voxydized
description: A high-performance Fabric 1.21.11 RPG pack. Overhauled world-gen, immersive audio, and a carefully crafted Light-RPG experience meet cutting-edge Voxy & Sodium optimizations.
body:
# 🌌 PacPack Voxydized

Welcome to **Voxydized**, a Fabric 1.21.11 modpack focused on breathtaking scale, high performance, and a carefully crafted Light-RPG experience. 

![Landscape of a medieval city close to a river with a moutain in the background](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2cc10e16002de3ea6add8c8d7e3bf9df9bbc2a69.jpeg)

## 🏔️ The Power of Voxy (Massive Render Distances)
At the core of this modpack is **Voxy**, a revolutionary LOD (Level of Detail) technology for Minecraft. Voxy allows you to see the world stretching for miles and admire entire continents without melting your PC. Combined with the sheer performance of **Sodium**, **Iris**, **C2ME**, and **Lithium**, you can experience unparalleled render distances and buttery-smooth gameplay.

## ⚔️ Light-RPG & Exploration
Rather than a heavy, complicated skill system, Voxydized offers a seamless "Vanilla+" Light-RPG feel:
* **Epic World Generation:** Explore majestic landscapes and mountains crafted by **Tectonic** and **Terralith**.
* **Dungeons & Loot:** Discover new structures with **Dungeons and Taverns** and **Explorify**. Thanks to **Lootr**, every player in a multiplayer server gets their own instanced loot!
* **Enhanced Progression:** Upgrade your gear smoothly with **Easy Magic** and **Easy Anvils**, and discover new late-game materials like **Bronze** and **Enderite**. 

## 🎧 Ultimate Immersion
* **Audio & Visuals:** **AmbientSounds**, **Presence Footsteps**, and **Visuality** make the Overworld feel incredibly alive and reactive.
* **Shaders:** The modpack comes with **Photon Shader**, calibrated to give you insane looking landscapes all over the world. You can also test every other shader you want thanks to Iris Shaders (make sure to use Voxy compatible shaders).

---

## 🌍 Play with Friends (Server Version)
Minecraft is always better together! I have created a dedicated server version of this modpack so you can easily host your own Voxydized world for you and your friends. 
👉 **[Click here to download the Server Pack](https://modrinth.com/project/pacpack-voxydized-server)**

---

## 🚀 Future Plans & Work in Progress
**Voxydized is currently in its early stages.** Because Minecraft 1.21.11 is a very specific technical version, many great mods are still being updated by their developers. 
* I plan to add more incredible features and mods as they become officially available for this version.
* In the future, I may also rebuild or port this modpack to other Minecraft versions to expand the gameplay even further. Stay tuned!

---
If you encounter any issue, feel free to come on Discord and describe your problem.

*Developed by the PacPack Team. Thank you for using our modpack!*
